_readme: Field-level overrides PATCHED into the LIVE server config files (we never store the whole vanilla/mod file - a game/mod update rewrites the baseline and these re-apply on top BY NAME, so updates are inherited, not fought). Keys starting with _ are ignored. Each patch is a target-file -> {selector -> value} map. XML selectors are XPath: an attribute node (//var[@name='X']/@value) or an element's text (//type[@name='AKM']/nominal). JSON selectors are a dotted key path (chanceToSpawn, or a.b.c). files.<relpath> targets one file under the server dir. mpmissions.common is applied to EVERY mission's files first; mpmissions.<mission> is applied AFTER common and WINS on conflict; its file keys are relative to that mission dir (e.g. db/globals.xml). Applied by Apply-ConfigOverrides.ps1 during a deploy: report-only by default, patches under -Fix. Each patch is independent and FAIL-SOFT - a missing file or unmatched selector is logged as a WARN and skipped, never aborting the rest. NOT managed here (FULL-FILE OWNED, authored wholesale in deploy/): profiles/AI_Bandits/DynamicAIB.json and StaticAIB.json - see deploy/profiles/AI_Bandits/README.md.

dayzOffline.sakhal._readme: Fresh-spawn loadout (Expansion SpawnSettings.json). PATCH only these fields so the rest of the file (SpawnLocations, cooldowns, clothing pools) stays whatever the box + map/inventory sync manages, and an Expansion update that rewrites the baseline is inherited. UpperGear = knife + heatpack only (no rags/apple); Backpacks emptied so fresh spawns carry no bag. Re-applied by prestart every start. Sakhal-scoped (only live map; heatpack is for its cold) - promote the knife/backpack bits to mpmissions.common if more maps go live.
